name: alien-kind
description: Architecture for building persistent, evolving AI partnerships on top of any LLM

scripts.test: npx tsx scripts/tools/doc-metrics.ts --check && npx tsx tests/test-portable.ts && npx tsx tests/test-prompt-hook-executor.ts && npx tsx tests/test-worktree.ts && npx tsx tests/test-context-doctor.ts
scripts.status: npx tsx -e "const { getCapabilityStatus, formatCapabilityStatus } = require('./scripts/lib/portable.ts'); getCapabilityStatus().then(s => console.log(formatCapabilityStatus(s)));"
